The first involves the sixth lord who is away from Jupiter
by 166 deg.ll'.38". Jupiter is the lord of the ninth from the
natural Zodiac. There was serious trouble about the hip-bone
and joint on May 17,1933. Exactly thirty years later he offered
to the deity what he promised earlier to give. The time lag is
nearly eleven months. The third aspect brought about the
marriage ofhis daughter after four months and 18 days. It is
a quintile aspect. The fourth as a semi square involved to lord
of the sixth who has changed signs with Saturn. Saturn as
